Search breadth: very thorough. You are surveying the Recipe Bottle bash codebase in /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/ to ground a plan-soundness review. Report FACTS about current code state (cite file:line), not opinions.

Questions to answer:

1. DELETE PATHS. How does `rbld_banish` (rbldl_Lifecycle.sh) delete a Lode today — host-issued REST DELETE via rbuh/rbge, or dispatching a cloud build? Does it poll the GAR LRO to terminal, or trust an HTTP 200? Same question for `rbfl_abjure` (rbfld_Delete.sh or wherever abjure lives). Quote the relevant lines. Also: is there ANY handling for multi-arch packages (deleting parent index first, per-version loop) in either delete path?

2. LRO REFERENCE. What does `rbge_lro_ok` in rbge_Rest.sh do — is it an honest poll-to-terminal? Who calls it?

3. CAPTURE SPINE. In rblds_Spine.sh: does the build envelope have a hardcoded Mason serviceAccount, or a caller-supplied one? Quote the serviceAccount composition.

4. TOOL STATE (gcrane vs skopeo vs docker). For each cloud step script under Tools/rbk/rbgjl*/rbgjl0*.sh and rbgjs/ snippets and rbgjm01: which tool does it invoke (gcrane / skopeo / docker / buildx / curl / gpg)? Specifically: does rbgjl01 (ensconce capture) use gcrane now? Does rbgjl03 (conclave) use `gcrane --platform linux/amd64 cp`? Does rbgjm01 (bind mirror) still use `skopeo copy --all`? Does rbgjs-token-fetch.sh still have #@rbgjs_include callers (grep for it)?

5. INSCRIBE / ENSHRINE RESIDUE. Does rbfli_Inscribe.sh still exist and is it live (wired to a colophon rbw-dI)? Do rbgje* enshrine step scripts still exist? Does zrbfc_resolve_tool_images in rbfca_StepAssembly.sh resolve tools from rbi_rq (legacy reliquary namespace) or from a conclave Lode (rbi_ld with :rbi_<tool> tags)? Does z_rbfc_tool_skopeo still exist?

6. GRANTS. In rbgg_Governor.sh: what build-capability grants does Director hold today vs Mason (workerPoolUser, actAs, builds.editor, repoAdmin)? Brief summary.

7. GCRANE COHORT. Is gcrane a member of the reliquary cohort / MANIFEST anywhere (search RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_* in rbgc_Constants.sh)? Is there a ZRBLD_GCRANE_BUILDER constant and where is it used?

Return a structured report keyed to these 7 questions, with file:line citations.

20	#   divine — enumerate Lodes / inspect one Lode's members (read-only)
21	#   banish — delete a whole Lode (Director credentials)
22	
23	set -euo pipefail
24	
25	######################################################################
26	# External Functions (rbld_*)
27	
28	rbld_divine() {
29	  zrbld_sentinel
30	
31	  local -r z_touchmark="${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"
32	
33	  buc_doc_brief "Divine Lodes — enumerate all Lodes, or inspect one Lode's members (read-only)"
34	  buc_doc_oparm "touchmark" "Lode stamp to inspect (e.g., b260602120000); omit to enumerate all Lodes"
35	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
36	
37	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
38	  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" \
39	    || buc_die "Director credential not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
40	  local z_token=""
41	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
42	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
43	
44	  if test -z "${z_touchmark}"; then
45	    buc_step "Enumerating Lodes under ${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/"
46	    zrbfc_list_anchors_capture "${z_token}" "${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}"
47	
48	    if ! test -s "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"; then
49	      buc_info "No Lodes found under ${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/"
50	      buc_success "Divine complete — 0 Lodes"
51	      return 0
52	    fi
53	
54	    # Kind-letter legend, printed once so rows carry no repeated per-row column.
55	    # A touchmark's leading letter is its kind (b260602075327 -> bole); the
56	    # reader decodes the prefix from this key. One entry per implemented kind.
57	    local -r z_kind_fmt="    %-3s %-10s %s\n"
58	    echo ""
59	    printf "  Kinds (touchmark prefix):\n"
60	    printf "${z_kind_fmt}" "${RBGC_LODE_KIND_BOLE}"      "bole"      "upstream OCI image, consumed as a FROM line"
61	    printf "${z_kind_fmt}" "${RBGC_LODE_KIND_RELIQUARY}" "reliquary" "date-cohort of build-tool images"
62	    printf "${z_kind_fmt}" "${RBGC_LODE_KIND_WSL}"       "wsl"       "vendor-published rootfs tarball, opaque-blob member"
63	
64	    # Load the touchmark list fully before iterating: the per-Lode tags fetch
65	    # spawns curl (via rbuh), and a child touching stdin would consume the
66	    # loop's remaining input. Load-then-iterate keeps that FD closed.
67	    local z_touchmarks=()
68	    local z_touch=""
69	    while IFS= read -r z_touch || test -n "${z_touch}"; do
70	      test -n "${z_touch}" || continue
71	      z_touchmarks+=("${z_touch}")
72	    done < "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"
73	
74	    local -r z_row_fmt="  %-15s %s\n"
75	    echo ""
76	    printf "${z_row_fmt}" "TOUCHMARK" "IMAGE"
77	    printf "${z_row_fmt}" "---------------" "--------------------------------------"
78	
79	    local z_idx=0
80	    local z_pkg=""
81	    local z_pkg_encoded=""
82	    local z_tags_url=""
83	    local z_enum_infix=""
84	    local z_resp_file=""
85	    local z_image_file=""
86	    local z_image=""
87	    for z_idx in "${!z_touchmarks[@]}"; do
88	      z_touch="${z_touchmarks[$z_idx]}"
89	
90	      # One tags-list per Lode. The IMAGE column adapts to the Lode's member
91	      # scheme (the touchmark prefix names the kind; see the legend above). A
92	      # single-image Lode (bole) shows its unsprued fingerprint tag
93	      # <sanitized-origin>-<sha10>, located via the sha10 taken from the
94	      # rbi_sha256-<hex> member tag so Director semantic names (also unsprued)
95	      # cannot masquerade as the fingerprint. A clean-scheme cohort (reliquary)
96	      # carries no digest/fingerprint layer, so it has no single fingerprint to
97	      # show — report its member count instead (every non-:rbi_vouch tag is a
98	      # member). Per-Lode infix preserves each response for forensics.
99	      z_pkg="${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/${z_touch}"
100	      z_pkg_encoded="${z_pkg//\//%2F}"
101	      z_tags_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_pkg_encoded}/tags?pageSize=1000"
102	      z_enum_infix="rbld_divine_enum_${z_idx}"
103	      rbuh_json "GET" "${z_tags_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_enum_infix}"
104	      rbuh_require_ok "List tags for Lode ${z_touch}" "${z_enum_infix}"
105	      z_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_enum_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
106	
107	      z_image_file="${ZRBLD_DIVINE_PREFIX}enum_${z_idx}_image.txt"
108	      jq -r --arg dp "${RBGC_LODE_TAG_DIGEST_PREFIX}" --arg vouch "${RBGC_LODE_TAG_VOUCH}" '
109	        [.tags[]?.name | sub(".*/tags/"; "")] as $names
110	        | ([$names[] | select(startswith($dp)) | ltrimstr($dp)[0:10]][0]) as $sha10
111	        | ([$names[] | select((startswith("rbi_") | not) and ($sha10 != null) and endswith("-" + $sha10))][0]) as $fingerprint
112	        | if $fingerprint != null then $fingerprint
113	          else "(cohort: \([$names[] | select(. != $vouch)] | length) members)"
114	          end
115	      ' "${z_resp_file}" > "${z_image_file}" \
116	        || buc_die "Failed to summarize Lode ${z_touch}"
117	      z_image=$(<"${z_image_file}")
118	      test -n "${z_image}" || buc_die "Empty summary extraction for Lode ${z_touch}"
119	
120	      printf "${z_row_fmt}" "${z_touch}" "${z_image}"
121	    done
122	    echo ""
123	    buc_info "Total Lodes: ${#z_touchmarks[@]}"
124	    buc_success "Divine complete"
125	    return 0
126	  fi
127	
128	  # Inspect depth: list the member tags on one Lode package.
129	  buc_step "Inspecting Lode ${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/${z_touchmark}"
130	  local -r z_pkg="${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/${z_touchmark}"
131	  local -r z_pkg_encoded="${z_pkg//\//%2F}"
132	  local -r z_tags_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_pkg_encoded}/tags?pageSize=1000"
133	  local -r z_tags_infix="rbld_divine_tags"
134	
135	  rbuh_json "GET" "${z_tags_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_tags_infix}"
136	  rbuh_require_ok "List tags for Lode ${z_touchmark}" "${z_tags_infix}"
137	
138	  local -r z_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_tags_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
139	  local -r z_tags_file="${ZRBLD_DIVINE_PREFIX}tags.txt"
140	  jq -r '.tags[]?.name | sub(".*/tags/"; "")' "${z_resp_file}" > "${z_tags_file}" \
141	    || buc_die "Failed to extract member tags for Lode ${z_touchmark}"
142	
143	  if ! test -s "${z_tags_file}"; then
144	    buc_die "No member tags found under ${z_pkg} — Lode not present in registry"
145	  fi
146	
147	  echo ""
148	  printf "  %s\n" "MEMBER-TAG"
149	  printf "  %s\n" "------------------------------"
150	  local z_count=0
151	  local z_tag=""
152	  while IFS= read -r z_tag || test -n "${z_tag}"; do
153	    test -n "${z_tag}" || continue
154	    printf "  %s\n" "${z_tag}"
155	    z_count=$((z_count + 1))
156	  done < "${z_tags_file}"
157	  echo ""
158	  buc_info "Total members: ${z_count}"
159	  buc_success "Divine complete — Lode ${z_touchmark}"
160	}
161	
162	rbld_banish() {
163	  zrbld_sentinel
164	
165	  local -r z_touchmark="${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"
166	
167	  buc_doc_brief "Banish a Lode — delete the whole rbi_ld/<touchmark> GAR package"
168	  buc_doc_param "touchmark" "Lode stamp to delete (e.g., b260602120000)"
169	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
170	
171	  test -n "${z_touchmark}" || buc_die "Touchmark parameter required"
172	
173	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
174	  local z_token=""
175	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
176	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
177	
178	  local -r z_pkg="${RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/${z_touchmark}"
179	  local -r z_pkg_encoded="${z_pkg//\//%2F}"
180	
181	  # Verify presence before delete so banish reports a clean not-found.
182	  buc_step "Verifying Lode present: ${z_pkg}"
183	  local -r z_tags_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_pkg_encoded}/tags?pageSize=1"
184	  local -r z_probe_infix="rbld_banish_probe"
185	  rbuh_json "GET" "${z_tags_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_probe_infix}"
186	  rbuh_require_ok "Probe Lode ${z_touchmark}" "${z_probe_infix}"
187	
188	  local z_tag_count=""
189	  z_tag_count=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_probe_infix}" '(.tags // []) | length') \
190	    || buc_die "Failed to count tags for ${z_pkg}"
191	  test "${z_tag_count}" -gt 0 \
192	    || buc_die "No Lode found at ${z_pkg} — nothing to banish"
193	
194	  buc_require "Will banish the whole Lode ${z_pkg} (single packages delete)" "yes"
195	
196	  # Single packages delete removes the package and all its member versions/tags
197	  # atomically. DELETE returns a long-running operation; trust 200 as accepted.
198	  buc_step "Deleting Lode package: ${z_pkg}"
199	  local -r z_del_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_pkg_encoded}"
200	  local -r z_del_infix="rbld_banish_del"
201	  rbuh_json "DELETE" "${z_del_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_del_infix}"
202	  rbuh_require_ok "Delete Lode package ${z_pkg}" "${z_del_infix}"
203	
204	  echo ""
205	  buc_success "Lode banished: ${z_touchmark}"
206	}
207	
208	# eof

35	  buc_doc_param "locator" "Image locator in package-path:tag format (e.g. rbi_hm/H/image:H)"
36	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
37	
38	  # Validate locator parameter
39	  test -n "${z_locator}" || buc_die "Locator parameter required (package-path:tag)"
40	
41	  # Parse locator into package path and tag
42	  case "${z_locator}" in
43	    *:*) : ;;
44	    *)   buc_die "Invalid locator format. Expected package-path:tag" ;;
45	  esac
46	  local z_pkg_path="${z_locator%:*}"
47	  local z_tag="${z_locator##*:}"
48	  test -n "${z_pkg_path}" || buc_die "Package path is empty in locator"
49	  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag is empty in locator"
50	
51	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
52	
53	  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
54	  local z_token
55	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
56	
57	  buc_require "Will jettison: ${z_locator}" "yes"
58	
59	  buc_step "Jettisoning: ${z_locator}"
60	
61	  # Jettison by tag reference
62	  local z_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}status.txt"
63	  local z_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}response.json"
64	  local z_stderr_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}stderr.txt"
65	
66	  rbuh_request "DELETE"                                                  \
67	                    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_pkg_path}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
68	                    "${z_token}"                                              \
69	                    "${z_response_file}" "${z_status_file}" "${z_stderr_file}" \
70	    || buc_die "DELETE request failed — see ${z_stderr_file}"
71	
72	  local z_http_code
73	  z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
74	  test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty"
75	
76	  if test "${z_http_code}" != "202" && test "${z_http_code}" != "204"; then
77	    local z_body="empty"
78	    if test -f "${z_response_file}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_response_file}"); fi
79	    buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
80	    buc_die "Jettison failed with HTTP ${z_http_code}"
81	  fi
82	
83	  buc_success "Jettisoned or nonexistent: ${z_locator}"
84	}

86	rbfl_abjure() {
87	  zrbfl_sentinel
88	
89	  local z_hallmark="${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"
90	
91	  # Documentation block
92	  buc_doc_brief "Abjure a hallmark — delete all GAR packages under rbi_hm/<hallmark>/"
93	  buc_doc_param "hallmark" "Full hallmark (e.g., c260305133650-r260305160530)"
94	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
95	
96	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"
97	
98	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
99	  local z_token
100	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
101	
102	  # Enumerate packages under rbi_hm/<hallmark>/ via GAR REST API.
103	  # Each immediate child of the subtree is one ark (image, vouch, pouch,
104	  # about, attest, diags). Iterating discovered children rather than a
105	  # hardcoded suffix list naturally tolerates graft's missing pouch.
106	  local -r z_subtree="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/"
107	  buc_step "Enumerating packages under ${z_subtree}"
108	
109	  local -r z_list_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages?pageSize=1000"
110	  local -r z_list_infix="rbfl_abjure_list"
111	
112	  rbuh_json "GET" "${z_list_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_list_infix}"
113	  rbuh_require_ok "List packages for abjure" "${z_list_infix}"
114	
115	  # GAR returns package names URL-encoded in the resource name (slashes as
116	  # %2F); decode and prefix-match to the hallmark subtree.
117	  local -r z_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_list_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
118	  local -r z_pkg_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}packages.txt"
119	
120	  jq -r --arg subtree "${z_subtree}" '
121	    .packages[]?.name
122	    | sub("^.*/packages/"; "")
123	    | gsub("%2F"; "/")
124	    | select(startswith($subtree))
125	  ' "${z_resp_file}" > "${z_pkg_file}" \
126	    || buc_die "Failed to extract package names for hallmark subtree"
127	
128	  if ! test -s "${z_pkg_file}"; then
129	    buc_die "No packages found under ${z_subtree} — hallmark not present in registry"
130	  fi
131	
132	  local z_count=0
133	  local z_count_line=""
134	  while IFS= read -r z_count_line || test -n "${z_count_line}"; do
135	    z_count=$((z_count + 1))
136	  done < "${z_pkg_file}"
137	
138	  local z_confirm_msg="Will abjure ${z_count} packages under ${z_subtree}:"
139	  local z_pkg_path=""
140	  while IFS= read -r z_pkg_path || test -n "${z_pkg_path}"; do
141	    z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${z_pkg_path}"
142	  done < "${z_pkg_file}"
143	  buc_require "${z_confirm_msg}" "yes"
144	
145	  # Delete each package via GAR REST API.
146	  # DELETE returns a long-running operation; trust 200 as accepted (matches
147	  # the prior fire-and-forget semantics with 202/204 on the v2 manifest API).
148	  local z_pkg_path=""
149	  local z_del_idx=0
150	  while IFS= read -r z_pkg_path || test -n "${z_pkg_path}"; do
151	    buc_step "Deleting package: ${z_pkg_path}"
152	
153	    local z_pkg_encoded="${z_pkg_path//\//%2F}"
154	    local z_del_url="${ZRBFC_GAR_API_BASE}/${ZRBFC_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE}/packages/${z_pkg_encoded}"
155	    local z_del_infix="rbfl_abjure_del_${z_del_idx}"
156	
157	    rbuh_json "DELETE" "${z_del_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_del_infix}"
158	    rbuh_require_ok "Delete package ${z_pkg_path}" "${z_del_infix}"
159	
160	    buc_info "Deleted: ${z_pkg_path}"
161	    z_del_idx=$((z_del_idx + 1))
162	  done < "${z_pkg_file}"
163	
164	  echo ""
165	  buc_success "Hallmark abjured: ${z_hallmark} (${z_count} packages)"
166	}

21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	test -z "${ZRBGE_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbge multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
25	ZRBGE_SOURCED=1
26	
27	######################################################################
28	# Internal Functions (zrbge_*)
29	
30	zrbge_kindle() {
31	  test -z "${ZRBGE_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbge already kindled"
32	
33	  # Ensure dependency kindled first (rbuh owns the HTTP temp-file machinery rbge consumes)
34	  zrbuh_sentinel
35	
36	  readonly ZRBGE_KINDLED=1
37	}
38	
39	zrbge_sentinel() {
40	  test "${ZRBGE_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbge not kindled - call zrbge_kindle first"
41	}
42	
43	######################################################################
44	# Capture Functions
45	
46	rbge_error_message_capture() {
47	  zrbge_sentinel
48	  local -r z_infix="${1:-}"
49	  test -n "${z_infix}" || return 1
50	
51	  if rbuh_json_valid_predicate "${z_infix}"; then
52	    rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message' 2>/dev/null || return 1
53	  else
54	    return 1
55	  fi
56	}
57	
58	######################################################################
59	# External / RBTOE Pattern Functions
60	
61	# Predicate: Check if resource was newly created and apply propagation delay
62	rbge_newly_created_delay() {
63	  zrbge_sentinel
64	
65	  local -r z_infix="${1}"
66	  local -r z_resource="${2}"
67	  local -r z_delay="${3}"
68	
69	  local z_code
70	  z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_infix}") || return 1
71	
72	  if test "${z_code}" = "200" || test "${z_code}" = "201"; then
73	    buc_step "Resource ${z_resource} newly created, waiting ${z_delay}s for propagation"
74	    sleep "${z_delay}"
75	  fi
76	}
77	
78	# POST + strict LRO handling (no heuristics)
79	rbge_lro_ok() {
80	  zrbge_sentinel
81	
82	  local -r z_label="${1}"
83	  local -r z_token="${2}"
84	  local -r z_post_url="${3}"
85	  local -r z_infix="${4}"
86	  local -r z_body="${5}"
87	  local -r z_name_jq="${6}"
88	  local -r z_poll_root="${7}"
89	  local -r z_op_prefix="${8}"
90	  local -r z_poll_interval="${9:-${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}}"
91	  local -r z_timeout="${10:-${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}}"
92	
93	  buc_log_args '1) POST the request'
94	  rbuh_json "POST" "${z_post_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" "${z_body}"
95	  rbuh_require_ok "${z_label}" "${z_infix}"
96	
97	  local z_done=""
98	  z_done=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
99	  test "${z_done}" = "true" && {
100	    local z_lro_error=""
101	    z_lro_error=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.error.message // empty') || z_lro_error=""
102	    if test -n "${z_lro_error}"; then
103	      local z_lro_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
104	      buc_warn "${z_label}: LRO completed with error — response saved: ${z_lro_resp_file}"
105	      buc_die "${z_label}: ${z_lro_error}"
106	    fi
107	    buc_log_args 'Immediate-done response -> success (no polling)'
108	    return 0
109	  }
110	
111	  buc_log_args '2) Extract op name (or return if not an LRO)'
112	  local z_name
113	  z_name=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" "${z_name_jq}") || z_name=""
114	  test -n "${z_name}" || {
115	    buc_log_args 'No LRO name present - treat as non-LRO success'
116	    return 0
117	  }
118	  buc_log_args '3) Build poll URL based on operation name format'
119	  local z_poll_url
120	  if [[ "${z_name}" =~ ^projects/.*/locations/.*/operations/ ]]; then
121	    buc_log_args '  Regional operation with fully-qualified name'
122	    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
123	  elif [[ "${z_name}" =~ ^projects/.*/operations/ ]]; then
124	    buc_log_args '  Global operation with project prefix'
125	    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
126	  elif test -n "${z_op_prefix}" && [[ ! "${z_name}" =~ ^${z_op_prefix} ]]; then
127	    buc_log_args '  Legacy format - apply prefix (not already present)'
128	    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_op_prefix}${z_name}"
129	  else
130	    buc_log_args '  Use name as-is under versioned root'
131	    z_poll_url="${z_poll_root}/${z_name}"
132	  fi
133	  buc_log_args "Poll URL: ${z_poll_url}"
134	
135	  buc_log_args '4) Poll until done or timeout'
136	  local z_elapsed=0
137	  while :; do
138	    sleep "${z_poll_interval}"
139	    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + z_poll_interval))
140	
141	    local z_poll_infix="${z_infix}-poll-${z_elapsed}s"
142	    rbuh_json "GET" "${z_poll_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_poll_infix}"
143	
144	    local z_code=""
145	    z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_poll_infix}") || z_code=""
146	    test "${z_code}" = "200" || buc_die "${z_label}: poll failed (HTTP ${z_code})"
147	
148	    z_done=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_poll_infix}" ".done") || z_done=""
149	    test "${z_done}" = "true" && {
150	      local z_lro_error=""
151	      z_lro_error=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_poll_infix}" '.error.message // empty') || z_lro_error=""
152	      if test -n "${z_lro_error}"; then
153	        local z_lro_resp_file="${ZRBUH_PREFIX}${z_poll_infix}${ZRBUH_POSTFIX_JSON}"
154	        buc_warn "${z_label}: LRO completed with error — response saved: ${z_lro_resp_file}"
155	        buc_die "${z_label}: ${z_lro_error}"
156	      fi
157	      buc_log_args "${z_label}: operation completed after ${z_elapsed}s"
158	      return 0
159	    }
160	
161	    test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${z_timeout}" && buc_die "${z_label}: timeout after ${z_timeout}s"
162	    buc_log_args "Still running at ${z_elapsed}s..."
163	  done
164	}

166	# RBTOE: API Enable Pattern
167	# Ensures a specified Google Cloud API is enabled in a project with idempotent behavior
168	rbge_api_enable() {
169	  zrbge_sentinel
170	
171	  local -r z_api_service="${1}"
172	  local -r z_project_id="${2}"
173	  local -r z_token="${3}"
174	
175	  test -n "${z_api_service}" || buc_die "rbge_api_enable: API service name required"
176	  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "rbge_api_enable: project ID required"
177	  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "rbge_api_enable: access token required"
178	
179	  buc_log_args "Enabling API ${z_api_service} in project ${z_project_id}"
180	
181	  local -r z_infix="api-enable-${z_api_service}"
182	  local -r z_enable_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com:enable"
183	
184	  # Attempt to enable the API
185	  rbuh_json "POST" "${z_enable_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" ""
186	
187	  local z_code
188	  z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_infix}") || buc_die "rbge_api_enable: failed to read HTTP code"
189	
190	  case "${z_code}" in
191	    200|201|204)
192	      buc_log_args "API enable request successful (HTTP ${z_code})"
193	      ;;
194	    400)
195	      # Check if already enabled
196	      local z_err
197	      z_err=$(rbge_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err="Unknown error"
198	      if [[ "${z_err}" =~ already.enabled ]] || [[ "${z_err}" =~ "already enabled" ]]; then
199	        buc_log_args "API ${z_api_service} already enabled"
200	        return 0
201	      else
202	        buc_die "rbge_api_enable (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
203	      fi
204	      ;;
205	    *)
206	      local z_err
207	      z_err=$(rbge_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err="Unknown error"
208	      buc_die "rbge_api_enable (HTTP ${z_code}): ${z_err}"
209	      ;;
210	  esac
211	
212	  # Check if this returned an LRO that needs polling
213	  local z_operation_name
214	  z_operation_name=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".name") || z_operation_name=""
215	
216	  if test -n "${z_operation_name}"; then
217	    buc_log_args "API enable returned LRO, polling for completion"
218	    # Use the LRO polling mechanism
219	    local -r z_poll_root="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1"
220	    rbge_lro_ok \
221	      "API Enable ${z_api_service}" \
222	      "${z_token}" \
223	      "${z_enable_url}" \
224	      "${z_infix}" \
225	      "" \
226	      ".name" \
227	      "${z_poll_root}" \
228	      ""
229	  fi
230	
231	  # Verify API is enabled
232	  local -r z_verify_infix="api-verify-${z_api_service}"
233	  local -r z_verify_url="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com/v1/projects/${z_project_id}/services/${z_api_service}.googleapis.com"
234	
235	  rbuh_json "GET" "${z_verify_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_verify_infix}" ""
236	  rbuh_require_ok "API Enable Verify ${z_api_service}" "${z_verify_infix}"
237	
238	  local z_state
239	  z_state=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${z_verify_infix}" ".state") || buc_die "Failed to read API state"
240	
241	  if test "${z_state}" != "ENABLED"; then
242	    buc_die "API ${z_api_service} not enabled after request (state: ${z_state})"
243	  fi
244	
245	  buc_log_args "API ${z_api_service} confirmed enabled"
246	}

17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Lode - capture-assembly spine (guard-free cluster, sourced by
20	# rbld0_Lode): the data-driven Cloud Build composer shared by every Lode capture
21	# kind. Takes a recipe (ordered, pre-resolved step rows) plus an opaque
22	# substitutions blob, composes the Build resource, submits, polls, and decodes a
23	# step's buildStepOutputs slot. Owns NO kind knowledge: the recipe and the
24	# substitutions are data; the only kind-flavored build knob (the poll ceiling) is
25	# passed by the body. Capture-domain constants (the mason capture SA, the TETHER
26	# pool, the regime build timeout) are spine-owned, because every Lode capture
27	# fetches upstream bytes as mason over the network — that is what capture is, not
28	# a per-kind choice. Built on the rbfcb_ build primitives (write-script-body,
29	# wait-build-completion), which it calls rather than absorbs.
30	#
31	# Contract: RBSCJ "Capture Composition Contract".
32	
33	set -euo pipefail
34	
35	######################################################################
36	# Capture-assembly spine (zrbld_spine_*)
37	
38	# Internal: dispatch-time substitution-coverage check. A capture step reads
39	# automapped _RBGL_* substitution registers; a reference to a key the body's
40	# substitutions blob never defines expands to empty inside the build and corrupts
41	# the capture silently — the one composition fault that is neither guarded in-step
42	# (unlike the /workspace handoff, which the steps test -f for themselves) nor cheap
43	# to surface (it costs the whole cook). The _RBGL_* references in a step body ARE
44	# its substitution requires — no separate declaration to drift from the code — so
45	# this scans the include-expanded body for them on non-comment lines and returns 1
46	# at the first reference absent from the blob's keys, logging the offending
47	# register. Sentinel-free return-1 primitive, like the rbfcb_ build primitives the
48	# dispatch loop already rides; the caller buc_die's with the step identity.
49	#
50	# Coverage is flat by design (RBSCJ "Substitution-coverage check"): substitutions
51	# automap into every step, so there is no cross-step ordering; the /workspace
52	# inter-step channel keeps its own in-step guards and is out of scope.
53	#
54	# Args: keys_file expanded_body_file
55	zrbld_spine_validate() {
56	  local -r z_keys_file="${1:?Substitution keys file required}"
57	  local -r z_body_file="${2:?Expanded body file required}"
58	
59	  test -f "${z_keys_file}" || return 1
60	  test -f "${z_body_file}" || return 1
61	
62	  # Keys as newline-bounded text for builtin whole-line membership tests. Empty
63	  # keys (a blob declaring no registers) is legitimate — no test -n.
64	  local -r z_keys=$(<"${z_keys_file}")
65	  local -r z_keys_blob=$'\n'"${z_keys}"$'\n'
66	
67	  # Load the body, then iterate — the file is closed before the scan begins.
68	  local z_lines=()
69	  local z_line=""
70	  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
71	    z_lines+=("${z_line}")
72	  done < "${z_body_file}"
73	
74	  local z_i=0
75	  local z_rest=""
76	  local z_ref=""
77	  for z_i in "${!z_lines[@]}"; do
78	    z_line="${z_lines[$z_i]}"
79	
80	    # Full-line comments only — a _RBGL_ token in a leading-# comment is
81	    # documentation, not a read; a trailing inline mention stays conservative.
82	    [[ ! "${z_line}" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]] || continue
83	
84	    # Each _RBGL_* token by repeated leftmost match; strip through the match so
85	    # the next token on the line surfaces.
86	    z_rest="${z_line}"
87	    while [[ "${z_rest}" =~ _RBGL_[A-Z0-9_]+ ]]; do
88	      z_ref="${BASH_REMATCH[0]}"
89	      case "${z_keys_blob}" in
90	        *$'\n'"${z_ref}"$'\n'*) ;;
91	        *) buc_log_args "Uncovered substitution register: ${z_ref}"; return 1 ;;
92	      esac
93	      z_rest="${z_rest#*"${z_ref}"}"
94	    done
95	  done
96	
97	  return 0
98	}
99	
100	# Internal: compose, submit, and poll a Lode capture Cloud Build from a recipe
101	# plus an opaque substitutions blob.
102	#
103	# A recipe row is a |-delimited 4-tuple: script_path|builder_image|id|entrypoint
104	#   - script_path:   absolute path to the step script, pre-resolved by the body
105	#                    (the spine owns no steps-directory knowledge)
106	#   - builder_image: the step's builder image ref (colons allowed — hence the
107	#                    | delimiter, since image tags/digests contain colons)
108	#   - id:            the Cloud Build step id
109	#   - entrypoint:    bash | sh | busybox | python3 — selects the composed shebang
110	#                    line (busybox -> /busybox/sh, the only shell in distroless
111	#                    :debug builder images such as gcrane:debug)
112	#
113	# The substitutions file holds a JSON object the spine slots verbatim into the
114	# Build envelope's `substitutions` field; the spine reads no key from it. The
115	# envelope shape (serviceAccount, options.automapSubstitutions, options.logging,
116	# options.pool, timeout) is the spine's; the values that vary by capture domain
117	# (mason SA, TETHER pool, regime timeout) are spine-owned constants.
118	#
119	# Args: token label poll_ceiling subs_file temp_prefix recipe_row...
120	zrbld_spine_dispatch() {
121	  zrbld_sentinel
122	
123	  local -r z_token="${1:?Token required}";                  shift
124	  local -r z_label="${1:?Label required}";                  shift
125	  local -r z_poll_ceiling="${1:?Poll ceiling required}";    shift
126	  local -r z_subs_file="${1:?Substitutions file required}"; shift
127	  local -r z_temp_prefix="${1:?Temp prefix required}";      shift
128	  test "$#" -ge 1 || buc_die "zrbld_spine_dispatch: recipe requires at least one step row"
129	
130	  test -s "${z_subs_file}" || buc_die "Substitutions file missing or empty: ${z_subs_file}"
131	
132	  # Read the substitutions blob's keys once for the dispatch-time coverage check;
133	  # the per-step scan rides the composition loop below, where each step body is
134	  # already include-expanded (zrbld_spine_validate). A JSON object cannot carry
135	  # duplicate keys, so no dedup is needed.
136	  local -r z_keys_file="${z_temp_prefix}subs_keys.txt"
137	  jq -r 'keys[]' "${z_subs_file}" > "${z_keys_file}" \
138	    || buc_die "Failed to read substitution keys from ${z_subs_file}"
139	
140	  buc_step "Composing ${z_label} Cloud Build steps from recipe"
141	  local -r z_steps_file="${z_temp_prefix}steps.json"
142	  echo "[]" > "${z_steps_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize ${z_label} steps JSON"
143	
144	  local z_row=""
145	  local z_script_path=""
146	  local z_builder=""
147	  local z_id=""
148	  local z_entrypoint=""
149	  local z_body_file=""
150	  local z_escaped_file=""
151	  local z_steps_built=""
152	  local z_body=""
153	  local z_shebang=""
154	  for z_row in "$@"; do
155	    IFS='|' read -r z_script_path z_builder z_id z_entrypoint <<<"${z_row}"
156	    test -n "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Recipe row missing script_path: ${z_row}"
157	    test -n "${z_builder}"     || buc_die "Recipe row missing builder_image: ${z_row}"
158	    test -n "${z_id}"          || buc_die "Recipe row missing id: ${z_row}"
159	    test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Step script not found: ${z_script_path}"
160	
161	    z_body_file="${z_temp_prefix}${z_id}_body.txt"
162	    z_escaped_file="${z_temp_prefix}${z_id}_escaped.txt"
163	    z_steps_built="${z_temp_prefix}${z_id}_steps.json"
164	
165	    zrbfc_write_script_body "${z_script_path}" "${z_body_file}" \
166	      || buc_die "Failed to read step script: ${z_script_path}"
167	    zrbfc_expand_includes "${z_body_file}" "${ZRBFC_RBGJS_SNIPPETS_DIR}" \
168	      || buc_die "Failed to expand snippet includes in step: ${z_script_path}"
169	    z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
170	    test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty step script body: ${z_script_path}"
171	
172	    zrbld_spine_validate "${z_keys_file}" "${z_body_file}" \
173	      || buc_die "Recipe step '${z_id}' references a substitution register absent from the composition blob (see transcript)"
174	
175	    case "${z_entrypoint}" in
176	      bash)    z_shebang="#!/bin/bash" ;;
177	      sh)      z_shebang="#!/bin/sh" ;;
178	      busybox) z_shebang="#!/busybox/sh" ;;
179	      python3) z_shebang="#!/usr/bin/env python3" ;;
180	      *)       buc_die "Unknown entrypoint '${z_entrypoint}' in recipe row: ${z_row}" ;;
181	    esac
182	    printf '%s\n%s' "${z_shebang}" "${z_body}" > "${z_escaped_file}" \
183	      || buc_die "Failed to write escaped step body for ${z_id}"
184	
185	    jq \
186	      --arg name "${z_builder}" \
187	      --arg id "${z_id}" \
188	      --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
189	      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, script: $script}]' \
190	      "${z_steps_file}" > "${z_steps_built}" \
191	      || buc_die "Failed to append step ${z_id}"
192	    mv "${z_steps_built}" "${z_steps_file}" \
193	      || buc_die "Failed to update steps JSON for ${z_id}"
194	  done
195	
196	  buc_log_args "Composing ${z_label} Build resource JSON"
197	  local -r z_build_file="${z_temp_prefix}build.json"
198	  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
199	
200	  jq -n \
201	    --slurpfile zjq_steps   "${z_steps_file}" \
202	    --slurpfile zjq_subs    "${z_subs_file}" \
203	    --arg       zjq_sa      "${z_mason_sa}" \
204	    --arg       zjq_pool    "${RBDC_POOL_TETHER}" \
205	    --arg       zjq_timeout "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
206	    '{
207	      steps: $zjq_steps[0],
208	      substitutions: $zjq_subs[0],
209	      serviceAccount: $zjq_sa,
210	      options: {
211	        automapSubstitutions: true,
212	        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
213	        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
214	      },
215	      timeout: $zjq_timeout
216	    }' > "${z_build_file}" \
217	    || buc_die "Failed to compose ${z_label} build JSON"
218	
219	  buc_log_args "${z_label} build JSON: ${z_build_file}"
220	
221	  rbrd_check "${z_token}"
222	
223	  buc_step "Submitting ${z_label} Cloud Build"
224	  rbuh_json "POST" "${ZRBFC_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" "${z_token}" \
225	    "lode_build_create" "${z_build_file}"
226	  rbuh_require_ok "${z_label} build submission" "lode_build_create"
227	
228	  local z_build_id
229	  z_build_id=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "lode_build_create" '.metadata.build.id') \
230	    || buc_die "Failed to capture build ID from builds.create response"
231	  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID empty in builds.create response"
232	  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBFC_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"
233	
234	  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBFC_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
235	  buc_info "${z_label} Cloud Build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
236	  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
237	
238	  zrbfc_wait_build_completion "${z_poll_ceiling}" "${z_label}"
239	}
240	
241	# Internal: decode the base64 JSON payload a step wrote to its buildStepOutputs
242	# slot into a destination file. The step index is the only generic parameter;
243	# what the decoded JSON means (its member-envelope shape) is the body's
244	# knowledge, not the spine's. Reads ZRBFC_BUILD_STATUS_FILE (the terminal build
245	# result registered by zrbfc_wait_build_completion).
246	# Args: step_index dest_file
247	zrbld_spine_extract() {
248	  zrbld_sentinel
249	
250	  local -r z_step_index="${1:?Step index required}"
251	  local -r z_dest_file="${2:?Destination file required}"
252	  local -r z_b64_file="${z_dest_file}.b64"
253	
254	  jq -r ".results.buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}] // empty" "${ZRBFC_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" \
255	    > "${z_b64_file}" || buc_die "Failed to extract buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}] from build result"
256	  test -s "${z_b64_file}" || buc_die "No buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}] in build result — step produced no output"
257	
258	  rbgo_base64_decode_file_to_file "${z_b64_file}" "${z_dest_file}" \
259	    || buc_die "Failed to decode buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}] base64"
260	  test -s "${z_dest_file}" || buc_die "Empty decoded buildStepOutputs[${z_step_index}]"
261	}
262	
263	# eof
264

19	# Recipe Bottle GCP Constants - Implementation (no printf required)
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)
25	test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
26	ZRBGC_SOURCED=1
27	
28	# Tinder constants (pure string literals, no variable expansion — available at source time)
29	# Depot project ID infix between RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX and RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER, consumed
30	# by rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh's RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID derivation.
31	RBGC_depot_project_infix="d-"
32	
33	######################################################################
34	# Internal Functions (zrbgc_*)
35	
36	zrbgc_kindle() {
37	  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"
38	
39	  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
40	  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
41	  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
42	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
43	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
44	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
45	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
46	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
47	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
48	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
49	
50	  # Global resource validation patterns
51	  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS  (timestamp survives — payor is installation-scoped, not depot-scoped)
52	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
53	
54	  # Basic Configuration
55	  readonly RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
56	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
57	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"
58	
59	  # Timeouts
60	  readonly RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
61	  readonly RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
62	  # Consecutive 404s rbuh_poll_until_gone requires before declaring a deleted
63	  # resource durably gone. GCP IAM's SA read path is multi-replica eventually-
64	  # consistent: a post-DELETE GET flaps 200<->404 for seconds as replicas
65	  # converge, so a single 404 is not durable proof — a same-name recreate can
66	  # still race a lagging replica's existence preflight. The streak debounces
67	  # that flap; any intervening 200 resets it. Bounded by RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC.
68	  readonly RBGC_GONE_CONFIRM_STREAK=3
69	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX=7
70	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC=10
71	
72	  # JWT-bearer consumer-side retry — every RBRA consumer absorbs the post-write
73	  # race where Google's OAuth backend has not yet accepted a freshly-minted SA
74	  # or its key, surfaced as `invalid_grant` paired with either
75	  # `Invalid JWT Signature.` (fresh-key lag) or `Invalid grant: account not
76	  # found` (fresh-SA lag). 90s budget locked by ₣BB pristine-tier contract;
77	  # cadence below.
78	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_BUDGET_SEC=90
79	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC=2
80	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_MAX_DELAY_SEC=15
81	
82	  # IAM-grant propagation retry — exponential-backoff budget shared by every
83	  # get-modify-set IAM grant site in rbgi_IAM.sh plus the inline GAR retry in
84	  # rbgg_invest_director. Recognizes three propagation classes against the
85	  # same time budget: (A) forward member-visibility (HTTP 400 "does not
86	  # exist"), (B) backward member-visibility (HTTP 400 "is not deleted"),
87	  # (C) caller-recently-empowered (HTTP 403 from resource-scope IAM caches).
88	  # Class C is time-bounded only — real propagation succeeds within budget,
89	  # real denial waits the budget and fails cleanly. RBSCIP locks the profile.
90	  readonly RBGC_PROPAGATION_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC=3
91	  readonly RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC=20
92	  readonly RBGC_PROPAGATION_DEADLINE_SEC=420
93	
94	  # HTTP transient-failure retry — bounded retry on curl-network blips
95	  # (connection refused 7, timeout 28, TLS handshake 35, recv failure 56).
96	  # Shared by rbuh_json and the OAuth token-mint POST. Other curl exits
97	  # are configuration-deterministic and fail fast.
98	  readonly RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_ATTEMPTS=3
99	  readonly RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_SLEEP_SEC=3
100	
101	  # docker login daemon->registry transient — the moby/moby#44350 signature.
102	  # docker login's registry-auth client carries a hardcoded, non-configurable
103	  # 15s timeout (moby/registry/auth.go); against a healthy-but-slow GAR auth
104	  # backend it fires prematurely, emitting this Go net/http stdlib string.
105	  # Alone among login/pull/push, login carries no internal retry, so callers
106	  # wrap it (rbgo_docker_login, zrbndb_docker_login) reusing the HTTP retry
107	  # budget above. The string is a Go standard-library invariant, stable across
108	  # docker versions; this is a surveyed-signature allowlist, NOT a catch-all —
109	  # real auth failures emit "unauthorized" and fail fast.
110	  readonly RBGC_DOCKER_LOGIN_TRANSIENT_SIGNATURE='Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers'
111	
112	  # docker login credential-persist failure under headless Cygwin. Docker
113	  # Desktop's docker-credential-wincred backend cannot reach the Windows
114	  # Credential Manager from an sshd session that owns no interactive logon
115	  # (cmdkey /list is empty over SSH), emitting this Win32 string (rc=1) AFTER
116	  # auth has already succeeded — the token mint and the push path are sound;
117	  # only the credential STORE fails. Windows docker also ignores an empty
118	  # credsStore (the CLI still detects wincred), so config alone cannot divert
119	  # the store to the file store. At this Palisade (docker's own credential store,
120	  # source we cannot edit) rbgo_docker_login bends ONCE on this exact signature:
121	  # since auth already succeeded it writes the credential into the base64 file
122	  # store itself (the config.json `auths` map docker push reads directly — the
123	  # form WSL uses natively) and treats login as done. A real auth failure emits
124	  # "unauthorized" and never matches. Stable Win32 system-error message;
125	  # corroborated by docker/cli#4353 and #1263. REMOVE the bend when the
126	  # uncontrolled-Cygwin host gains an interactive Windows logon / working vault.
127	  readonly RBGC_DOCKER_WINCRED_HEADLESS_SIGNATURE='A specified logon session does not exist'
128	
129	  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
130	  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
131	  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_AUTHORIZE_URL="https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth"
132	  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_USERINFO_URL="https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/userinfo"
133	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
134	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
135	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
136	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
137	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
138	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
139	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"
140	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER="https://secretmanager.googleapis.com"
141	  readonly RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
142	  readonly RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"
143	
144	  # OAuth Scopes
145	  readonly RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"
146	
147	  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
148	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
149	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
150	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
151	
152	  # Email/Domain Assembly
153	  readonly RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"
154	
155	  # API Version Paths
156	  readonly RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
157	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
158	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
159	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
160	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
161	  readonly RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
162	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
163	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
164	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
165	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
166	  readonly RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1="/v1"
167	
168	  # REST Path Fragments
169	  readonly RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"
170	  readonly RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS="/locations"
171	  readonly RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES="/repositories"
172	  readonly RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="/serviceAccounts"
173	  readonly RBGC_PATH_KEYS="/keys"
174	
175	  # REST Operation Suffixes
176	  readonly RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
177	  readonly RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"
178	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX=":enable"
179	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES="/services"
180	
181	  # Operation Prefixes
182	  readonly RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL="operations/"
183	
184	  # Ark Artifact Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
185	  # Each ark type is a plain basename sibling under rbi_hm/<hallmark>/.
186	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE="image"
187	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT="about"
188	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH="vouch"
189	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS="diags"
190	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST="attest"
191	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH="pouch"
192	
193	  # Hallmark Prefix Letters
194	  # Encode artifact provenance in the leading character of a hallmark stamp.
195	  # Kludge hallmarks are local-only; the other three originate in GAR.
196	  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_CONJURE="c"
197	  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_KLUDGE="k"
198	  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_BIND="b"
199	  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_GRAFT="g"

23	# Operational Invariants (RBGG is single writer; 409 is fatal)
24	#
25	# - Single admin actor: All RBGG operations are executed by a single admin
26	#   identity. There are no concurrent writers in the same project.
27	# - Pristine-state expectation: RBGG init/creation flows assume the project
28	#   is pristine for the resources they manage. If a resource "already exists"
29	#   (HTTP 409), that's treated as state drift or prior manual activity.
30	# - Policy: All HTTP 409 Conflict responses are fatal (buc_die). We do not
31	#   treat 409 as idempotent success anywhere in RBGG.
32	#   If you see a 409, resolve state drift first (destroy/reset), then rerun.
33	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
34	
35	set -euo pipefail
36	
37	# Multiple inclusion detection
38	test -z "${ZRBGG_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgg multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
39	ZRBGG_SOURCED=1
40	
41	######################################################################
42	# Internal Functions (zrbgg_*)
43	
44	zrbgg_kindle() {
45	  test -z "${ZRBGG_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgg already kindled"
46	
47	  test -n "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"     || buc_die "RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"
48	  test   "${#RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" -gt 0 || buc_die "RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty"
49	
50	  buc_log_args 'Ensure dependencies are kindled first'
51	  zrbgc_sentinel
52	  zrbgo_sentinel
53	  zrbuh_sentinel
54	  zrbgi_sentinel
55	
56	  readonly ZRBGG_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_"
57	  readonly ZRBGG_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGG_PREFIX}empty.json"
58	  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGG_EMPTY_JSON}"
59	
60	  # Infix values for HTTP operations
61	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE="create"
62	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_PREFLIGHT="preflight"
63	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY="verify"
64	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY="key"
65	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY_DELETE="key_delete"
66	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_IAM_ENABLE="api_iam_enable"
67	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CRM_ENABLE="api_crm_enable"
68	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_ART_ENABLE="api_art_enable"
69	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_BUILD_ENABLE="api_build_enable"
70	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_CB_SA_ACCOUNT_GEN="cb_account_gen"
71	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_CB_PRIME="cb_prime"
72	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CONTAINERANALYSIS_ENABLE="api_containeranalysis_enable"
73	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_STORAGE_ENABLE="api_storage_enable"
74	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO="project_info"
75	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE_REPO="create_repo"
76	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY_REPO="verify_repo"
77	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_DELETE_REPO="delete_repo"
78	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_REPO_POLICY="repo_policy"
79	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_RPOLICY_SET="repo_policy_set"
80	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_ROSTER="roster"
81	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CHECK="api_checking"
82	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_DELETE="delete"
83	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_DELETE_GONE="delete_gone"
84	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS="list_keys"
85	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE="bucket_create"
86	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_DELETE="bucket_delete"
87	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_LIST="bucket_list"
88	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_OBJECT_DELETE="object_delete"
89	  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_LIENS="list_liens"

101	# Path-driven sibling of rbuh_json_field_capture for files that live outside

104	zrbgg_secrets_json_field_capture() {

114	######################################################################

117	zrbgg_required_apis_missing_capture() {
118	  zrbgg_sentinel
119	
120	  local z_token="${1:-}"

122	
123	  local z_missing=""
124	  local z_api=""
125	  local z_service=""
126	  local z_infix=""
127	  local z_state=""
128	  local z_code=""

142	
143	    buc_log_args 'If we cannot even read an HTTP code file, that is a processing failure.'
144	    z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_infix}") || z_code=""

159	zrbgg_create_service_account_with_key() {
160	  zrbgg_sentinel
161	
162	  local z_account_name="$1"
163	  local z_display_name="$2"
164	  local z_description="$3"
165	  local z_role="$4"
166	
167	  local z_account_email="${z_account_name}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"
168	
169	  buc_step 'Get OAuth token from admin'
170	  local z_token
171	  z_token=$(rba_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
172	
173	  buc_step "Preflight: does ${z_account_name} already exist?"
174	  # Idempotent establish (RBSRK/RBSDK): a pre-existing SA is not drift — keep the
175	  # identity (email + uid + its IAM bindings) and rotate only the key below. When
176	  # absent, create the SA first. Either branch ends with exactly one fresh key.
177	  rbuh_json "GET" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}" "${z_token}" \
178	                                                 "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PREFLIGHT}"
179	  local z_preflight_code
180	  z_preflight_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PREFLIGHT}") || z_preflight_code=""
181	  local z_sa_exists=0
182	  case "${z_preflight_code}" in
183	    404) buc_log_args "Service account ${z_account_email} absent — will create" ;;
184	    200) z_sa_exists=1; buc_log_args "Service account ${z_account_email} exists — establishing key only (SA and bindings untouched)" ;;
185	    *)   buc_die "Preflight GET for ${z_account_email} returned unexpected HTTP ${z_preflight_code}" ;;
186	  esac
187	
188	  local z_sa_uid=""
189	  if test "${z_sa_exists}" = "0"; then
190	    buc_step "Create request JSON for ${z_account_name}"
191	    jq -n                                      \
192	      --arg account_id "${z_account_name}"     \
193	      --arg display_name "${z_display_name}"   \
194	      --arg description "${z_description}"     \
195	      '{
196	        accountId: $account_id,
197	        serviceAccount: {
198	          displayName: $display_name,
199	          description: $description
200	        }
201	      }' > "${ZRBGG_PREFIX}create_request.json" || buc_die "Failed to create request JSON"
202	
203	    buc_step 'Create service account via REST API'
204	    rbuh_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}" "${z_token}" \
205	      "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}" "${ZRBGG_PREFIX}create_request.json"
206	    rbuh_require_ok "Create service account" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}"
207	
208	    z_sa_uid=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}" '.uniqueId') \
209	      || buc_die "Failed to get uniqueId from SA creation response"
210	    buc_info "Service account created: ${z_account_email} (uid: ${z_sa_uid})"
211	
212	    rbuh_poll_until_ok "SA propagation (by email)" \
213	      "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY}"
214	  else
215	    z_sa_uid=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PREFLIGHT}" '.uniqueId') \
216	      || buc_die "Failed to get uniqueId from existing SA"
217	    buc_info "Service account exists: ${z_account_email} (uid: ${z_sa_uid})"
218	  fi
219	
220	  buc_step 'List existing USER_MANAGED keys (before blunt-kill)'
221	
222	  # Subresource read-path can lag SA email-path readiness — flap observed
223	  # 200→200→404 on freshly-minted depots. Retry on the actual call, not a
224	  # proxy probe (see RBSCIP "SA keys subresource propagation").
225	  local z_list_attempt=0
226	  local z_list_infix=""
227	  local z_list_code=""
228	  while :; do
229	    z_list_attempt=$((z_list_attempt + 1))
230	    z_list_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}-attempt${z_list_attempt}"
231	    rbuh_json "GET"                                                        \
232	      "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}${RBGC_PATH_KEYS}"        \
233	                                        "${z_token}" "${z_list_infix}"
234	
235	    z_list_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${z_list_infix}") || z_list_code=""
236	
237	    if test "${z_list_code}" = "200"; then
238	      break
239	    fi
240	
241	    if test "${z_list_code}" = "404" && test "${z_list_attempt}" -lt "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX}"; then
242	      buc_warn "keys.list returned 404 (SA read-path propagation delay), retry ${z_list_attempt}/${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX} in ${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC}s..."
243	      sleep "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC}"
244	      continue
245	    fi
246	
247	    rbuh_require_ok "List service account keys" "${z_list_infix}"
248	  done
249	
250	  buc_step 'Blunt-kill: delete every existing USER_MANAGED key before minting'

19	# Recipe Bottle Foundry Ledger - inscribe cluster (guard-free, sourced by rbflk_):
20	# mirror all tool images from upstream into a datestamped GAR reliquary namespace
21	# via Cloud Build (Director credentials).
22	
23	set -euo pipefail
24	
25	######################################################################
26	# Inscribe (zrbfl_* / rbfl_*)
27	
28	# Internal: Submit inscribe Cloud Build job.
29	# Single step: docker pull each upstream tool image, tag for GAR, push.
30	# Uses gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker as step image (always pullable — Google-hosted).
31	zrbfl_inscribe_submit() {
32	  zrbfl_sentinel
33	
34	  local -r z_token="${1:?Token required}"
35	  local -r z_reliquary="${2:?Reliquary datestamp required}"
36	
37	  buc_step "Constructing inscribe Cloud Build resource"
38	  local -r z_gar_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
39	  local -r z_gar_path="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
40	  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
41	
42	  # Inscribe step image: Google-hosted docker builder (always pullable, even under NO_PUBLIC_EGRESS)
43	  local -r z_step_image="gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker"
44	
45	  # Assemble inscribe step from script
46	  local -r z_script_path="${ZRBFL_RBGJI_STEPS_DIR}/rbgji01-inscribe-mirror.sh"
47	  test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Inscribe step script not found: ${z_script_path}"
48	
49	  local -r z_body_file="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}body.txt"
50	  local -r z_escaped_file="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}escaped.txt"
51	
52	  buc_log_args "Reading inscribe step script (skip shebang)"
53	  zrbfc_write_script_body "${z_script_path}" "${z_body_file}" \
54	    || buc_die "Failed to read inscribe step script"
55	  local z_body=""
56	  z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
57	  test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty inscribe script body"
58	
59	  printf '#!/bin/bash\n%s' "${z_body}" > "${z_escaped_file}" \
60	    || buc_die "Failed to write escaped inscribe script body"
61	
62	  local -r z_step_file="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}step.json"
63	  echo "[]" > "${z_step_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize inscribe step JSON"
64	
65	  local -r z_step_built="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}step_built.json"
66	  jq \
67	    --arg name "${z_step_image}" \
68	    --arg id "inscribe-mirror" \
69	    --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
70	    '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, script: $script}]' \
71	    "${z_step_file}" > "${z_step_built}" \
72	    || buc_die "Failed to build inscribe step JSON"
73	  mv "${z_step_built}" "${z_step_file}" \
74	    || buc_die "Failed to finalize inscribe step JSON"
75	
76	  # Compose Build resource JSON
77	  buc_log_args "Composing inscribe Build resource JSON"
78	  local -r z_build_file="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}build.json"
79	
80	  jq -n \
81	    --slurpfile zjq_steps  "${z_step_file}" \
82	    --arg zjq_sa           "${z_mason_sa}" \
83	    --arg zjq_gar_host         "${z_gar_host}" \
84	    --arg zjq_gar_path         "${z_gar_path}" \
85	    --arg zjq_reliquaries_root "${RBGL_RELIQUARIES_ROOT}" \
86	    --arg zjq_reliquary        "${z_reliquary}" \
87	    --arg zjq_pool             "${RBDC_POOL_TETHER}" \
88	    --arg zjq_timeout          "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
89	    '{
90	      steps: $zjq_steps[0],
91	      substitutions: {
92	        _RBGN_GAR_HOST:         $zjq_gar_host,
93	        _RBGN_GAR_PATH:         $zjq_gar_path,
94	        _RBGN_RELIQUARIES_ROOT: $zjq_reliquaries_root,
95	        _RBGN_RELIQUARY:        $zjq_reliquary
96	      },
97	      serviceAccount: $zjq_sa,
98	      options: {
99	        automapSubstitutions: true,
100	        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
101	        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
102	      },
103	      timeout: $zjq_timeout
104	    }' > "${z_build_file}" \
105	    || buc_die "Failed to compose inscribe build JSON"
106	
107	  buc_log_args "Inscribe build JSON: ${z_build_file}"
108	
109	  rbrd_check "${z_token}"
110	
111	  buc_step "Submitting inscribe Cloud Build"
112	  rbuh_json "POST" "${ZRBFC_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" "${z_token}" \
113	    "reliquary_build_create" "${z_build_file}"
114	  rbuh_require_ok "Inscribe build submission" "reliquary_build_create"
115	
116	  local z_build_id=""
117	  z_build_id=$(rbuh_json_field_capture "reliquary_build_create" '.metadata.build.id') || z_build_id=""
118	  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID not found in builds.create response"
119	  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBFC_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"
120	
121	  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBFC_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
122	  buc_info "Inscribe build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
123	  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
124	
125	  zrbfc_wait_build_completion "${ZRBFC_BUILD_POLL_CEILING_INSCRIBE}" "Inscribe"
126	}
127	
128	rbfl_inscribe() {
129	  zrbfl_sentinel
130	
131	  buc_doc_brief "Inscribe a reliquary: mirror all tool images from upstream to a datestamped GAR namespace"
132	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
133	
134	  # Authenticate as Director
135	  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
136	  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"
137	
138	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
139	  local z_token=""
140	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
141	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
142	
143	  # Compute reliquary datestamp: r + YYMMDDHHMMSS
144	  local -r z_reliquary="r${BURD_NOW_STAMP:2:6}${BURD_NOW_STAMP:9:6}"
145	  buc_info "Reliquary: ${z_reliquary}"
146	
147	  # Submit inscribe as a Cloud Build job (docker pull/tag/push on GCB)
148	  zrbfl_inscribe_submit "${z_token}" "${z_reliquary}"
149	
150	  buf_write_fact_single "${RBF_FACT_RELIQUARY}" "${z_reliquary}"

1	#!/bin/bash
2	# RBGJL Step 01: Ensconce a base image into a Lode (capture) via gcrane
3	# Builder: gcr.io/go-containerregistry/gcrane:debug (Google-hosted, ambient GAR auth)
4	# Substitutions: _RBGL_GAR_HOST, _RBGL_GAR_PATH, _RBGL_LODES_ROOT,
5	#                _RBGL_TAG_BOLE, _RBGL_TAG_DIGEST_PREFIX,
6	#                _RBGL_TRUST_GRADE, _RBGL_VOUCH_SCHEMA, _RBGL_ACQUIRED_BY,
7	#                _RBGL_IMAGE_1_ORIGIN, _RBGL_IMAGE_2_ORIGIN, _RBGL_IMAGE_3_ORIGIN,
8	#                _RBGL_LODE_1_STAMP,   _RBGL_LODE_2_STAMP,   _RBGL_LODE_3_STAMP
9	#
10	# For each non-empty (ORIGIN, STAMP) slot: read the upstream manifest, measure the
11	# canonical digest, gcrane cp into ONE GAR package rbi_ld/<stamp>, then apply the
12	# member tags by gcrane tag (registry-side, no blob round-trip). Author the
13	# provenance envelope and stage it for step 02 (the :rbi_vouch artifact) and for
14	# the host capture-file via /builder/outputs/output. gcrane authenticates GAR
15	# ambiently via its google.Keychain (Mason SA, GCE metadata server) — no token.
16	#
17	# Package shape:  <host>/<path>/<LODES_ROOT>/<stamp>            (one package = one Lode)
18	# Member tags on that package, all pointing at the base manifest:
19	#   :<TAG_DIGEST_PREFIX><full-hex>   canonical OCI digest (exact cross-Lode dedup)
20	#   :<TAG_BOLE>                      uniform greppable handle
21	#   :<sanitized-origin>-<sha10>      UNSPRUED — name + glance-fingerprint (= legacy enshrine anchor)
22	# The :rbi_vouch tag is a separate manifest pushed by step 02.
23	
24	set -euo pipefail
25	echo "=== Ensconce base images into Lodes ==="
26	
27	# No token fetch: gcrane authenticates GAR ambiently through its google.Keychain
28	# (ADC -> GCE metadata server, the Mason SA). No --creds on any gcrane command.
29	
30	# CB substitutions are expanded at submit time, not available as shell variables.
31	# Capture each into a runtime variable so we can loop.
32	SLOT_1_ORIGIN="${_RBGL_IMAGE_1_ORIGIN}"
33	SLOT_2_ORIGIN="${_RBGL_IMAGE_2_ORIGIN}"
34	SLOT_3_ORIGIN="${_RBGL_IMAGE_3_ORIGIN}"
35	SLOT_1_STAMP="${_RBGL_LODE_1_STAMP}"
36	SLOT_2_STAMP="${_RBGL_LODE_2_STAMP}"
37	SLOT_3_STAMP="${_RBGL_LODE_3_STAMP}"
38	
39	# Acquisition moment, attested once for the whole build.
40	ACQUIRED_AT=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
41	
42	# Stamp roster for step 02 (one line per captured Lode).
43	: > /workspace/lode_stamps.txt
44	
45	# Initialize result JSON (host reads this back as the capture-file source)
46	RESULT='{'
47	FIRST=true
48	
49	for SLOT in 1 2 3; do
50	  case "${SLOT}" in
51	    1) ORIGIN="${SLOT_1_ORIGIN}"; STAMP="${SLOT_1_STAMP}" ;;
52	    2) ORIGIN="${SLOT_2_ORIGIN}"; STAMP="${SLOT_2_STAMP}" ;;
53	    3) ORIGIN="${SLOT_3_ORIGIN}"; STAMP="${SLOT_3_STAMP}" ;;
54	  esac
55	  test -n "${ORIGIN}" || continue
56	  test -n "${STAMP}"  || { echo "FATAL: slot ${SLOT} has ORIGIN but no STAMP" >&2; exit 1; }
57	
58	  echo "--- Slot ${SLOT}: ${ORIGIN} -> ${_RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/${STAMP} ---"
59	
60	  # Read the upstream manifest, take the canonical digest, derive the glance
61	  # fingerprint — shared snippet (requires ORIGIN + RAW_FILE; provides SHA + FINGERPRINT).
62	  RAW_FILE="/workspace/ensconce_raw_${SLOT}.json"
63	#@rbgjs_include gcrane-fingerprint
64	
65	  DIGEST_TAG="${_RBGL_TAG_DIGEST_PREFIX}${SHA}"
66	  PKG="${_RBGL_GAR_HOST}/${_RBGL_GAR_PATH}/${_RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/${STAMP}"
67	
68	  echo "Package: ${PKG}"
69	  echo "Digest:  sha256:${SHA}"
70	  echo "Tags:    ${DIGEST_TAG}, ${_RBGL_TAG_BOLE}, ${FINGERPRINT}"
71	
72	  # Collision guard — never silently clobber an existing Lode. The bole handle
73	  # (:rbi_bole) always points at this touchmark's captured image, so read it:
74	  # absent => a fresh touchmark; present => re-use. Re-use is legitimate ONLY when
75	  # it is the identical canonical digest (a Cloud Build retry re-copying the same
76	  # bytes); a different digest under the same touchmark is a clobber and fails loud.
77	  # The check sits immediately before the copy in this same step — atomic with the
78	  # GAR write in the sense the spec requires (no host pre-submit window). EXISTING_SHA
79	  # is computed the same way as SHA (sha256sum of the raw manifest), so the compare is
80	  # apples-to-apples. A manifest-read failure is treated as absent: cloud-side
81	  # auth/network is reliable, and a genuine GAR outage fails the copy below regardless.
82	  EXISTING_RAW="/workspace/ensconce_existing_${SLOT}.json"
83	  if gcrane manifest "${PKG}:${_RBGL_TAG_BOLE}" > "${EXISTING_RAW}" 2>/dev/null; then
84	    EXISTING_SHA=$(sha256sum "${EXISTING_RAW}" | cut -d' ' -f1)
85	    if [ "${EXISTING_SHA}" = "${SHA}" ]; then
86	      echo "Touchmark ${STAMP} already holds identical digest sha256:${SHA} — idempotent retry, proceeding."
87	    else
88	      echo "FATAL: touchmark collision at ${PKG}" >&2
89	      echo "  existing :${_RBGL_TAG_BOLE} -> sha256:${EXISTING_SHA}" >&2
90	      echo "  refusing to clobber with  -> sha256:${SHA}" >&2
91	      echo "  (banish the Lode first, or ensconce under a fresh touchmark)" >&2
92	      exit 1
93	    fi
94	  else
95	    echo "Touchmark ${STAMP} is fresh (no existing :${_RBGL_TAG_BOLE})."
96	  fi
97	
98	  # Copy upstream into the Lode package under the canonical digest tag. gcrane cp
99	  # copies the whole reference (manifest list and all per-platform manifests for a
100	  # multi-arch index) and preserves the manifest digest byte-for-byte.

1	#!/bin/bash
2	# RBGJL Step 03: Conclave the build-tool cohort into a Lode (capture) via gcrane
3	# Builder: gcr.io/go-containerregistry/gcrane:debug (Google-hosted, always pullable —
4	#          conclave captures the reliquary tools themselves, so it cannot bootstrap
5	#          from a reliquary; gcrane authenticates GAR ambiently via its google.Keychain
6	#          -> ADC -> the GCE metadata server as the Mason SA, no explicit login. The
7	#          :debug variant carries /busybox/sh for the orchestration. Auth canon: RBSCB)
8	# Substitutions: _RBGL_GAR_HOST, _RBGL_GAR_PATH, _RBGL_LODES_ROOT, _RBGL_LODE_STAMP,
9	#                _RBGL_TAG_SPRUE, _RBGL_TRUST_GRADE, _RBGL_VOUCH_SCHEMA,
10	#                _RBGL_ACQUIRED_BY
11	#
12	# Pull each build-tool image from upstream, tag it into ONE GAR package
13	# rbi_ld/<stamp> under the clean member tag :rbi_<tool>, and push. Author the
14	# batch provenance envelope (members[] one per tool — the cardinality axis) and
15	# stage it for step 02 (the :rbi_vouch artifact) and for the host capture-file via
16	# /builder/outputs/output. Single-platform (linux/amd64) — tool images run as GCB
17	# steps on amd64 workers; gcrane cp --platform linux/amd64 copies just the amd64
18	# manifest registry->registry (daemonless — no docker daemon, no pull/tag/push).
19	#
20	# Package shape:  <host>/<path>/<LODES_ROOT>/<stamp>     (one package = one Lode)
21	# Member tags on that package, each a distinct tool manifest:
22	#   :<TAG_SPRUE><tool>   e.g. rbi_gcloud, rbi_skopeo   (clean scheme — no digest layer)
23	# The :rbi_vouch tag is a separate manifest pushed by step 02.
24	
25	set -euo pipefail
26	echo "=== Conclave build-tool cohort into a Lode ==="
27	
28	STAMP="${_RBGL_LODE_STAMP}"
29	test -n "${STAMP}" || { echo "FATAL: _RBGL_LODE_STAMP missing" >&2; exit 1; }
30	
31	PKG="${_RBGL_GAR_HOST}/${_RBGL_GAR_PATH}/${_RBGL_LODES_ROOT}/${STAMP}"
32	echo "Lode package: ${PKG}"
33	
34	# Tool image cohort (short-name|upstream-ref) — authoritative co-versioned set for
35	# GCB step execution; mirrors the legacy inscribe manifest (rbgji01) verbatim (the
36	# two coexist during the reliquary cutover). gcloud, docker, and gcrane are
37	# Google-hosted (gcr.io); the rest are third-party. gcrane rides the :debug variant
38	# so the resolved cohort member keeps the /busybox/sh shell its capture steps need.
39	# The cohort is the heredoc feeding the while-read loop at its `done`, below — this
40	# step runs under /busybox/sh (gcrane:debug's only shell), which has no bash arrays,
41	# so the cohort cannot be expressed as the `MANIFEST=( … )` array rbgji01 (running
42	# under bash) still uses; a while-read over a `|`-split heredoc is the POSIX form,
43	# matching rbgjl02's stamp loop.
44	
45	# Acquisition moment, attested once for the whole cohort.
46	ACQUIRED_AT=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
47	
48	# Accumulate the envelope members[] as we capture (one element per tool). No jq
49	# dependency — values are controlled (tool name, upstream ref, hex digest, SA
50	# email, build id, ISO timestamp); none can carry a literal quote.
51	MEMBERS=''
52	MFIRST=true
53	
54	while IFS='|' read -r NAME UPSTREAM; do
55	  test -n "${NAME}" || continue
56	  MEMBER_TAG="${_RBGL_TAG_SPRUE}${NAME}"
57	  DEST="${PKG}:${MEMBER_TAG}"
58	
59	  echo "--- ${NAME}: ${UPSTREAM} -> ${DEST} ---"
60	
61	  # gcrane cp copies registry->registry by digest, daemonless (no docker pull/tag/push).
62	  # --platform linux/amd64 flattens a multi-arch upstream to the SINGLE amd64 manifest.
63	  # This is conclave-ONLY and must not leak to other Lode kinds (bole/wsl keep full-
64	  # fidelity capture): the reliquary cohort is consumed solely as GCB step images on
65	  # amd64 workers, so the other platforms are dead bytes — and a full multi-arch index
66	  # makes the Lode package a parent-index/child-manifest web that GAR's `packages
67	  # delete` cannot unwind in one cascade (it removes a parent, GAR auto-deletes the
68	  # protected children, then the cascade reaches an already-gone child and fails
69	  # NOT_FOUND). Phenomenon + references: RBSLC (conclave) and RBSLB (banish).
70	  gcrane --platform linux/amd64 cp "${UPSTREAM}" "${DEST}" \
71	    || { echo "FATAL: gcrane cp failed for ${UPSTREAM} -> ${DEST}" >&2; exit 1; }
72	
73	  # Record the upstream manifest-list digest for the envelope. gcrane digest (no
74	  # --platform) streams the tag's stored index digest (sha256:...) — the same canonical
75	  # value docker's RepoDigests reported, unchanged by the single-platform copy above, so
76	  # recorded digests stay identical to the pre-eviction docker path. CBb_101 applies.
77	  DIGEST=$(gcrane digest "${UPSTREAM}") \
78	    || { echo "FATAL: gcrane digest failed for ${UPSTREAM}" >&2; exit 1; }
79	  test -n "${DIGEST}" || { echo "FATAL: empty digest for ${UPSTREAM}" >&2; exit 1; }
80	
81	  echo "${NAME} captured: ${DEST} (${DIGEST})"
82	
83	  if [ "${MFIRST}" = "true" ]; then MFIRST=false; else MEMBERS="${MEMBERS},"; fi
84	  MEMBERS="${MEMBERS}{"
85	  MEMBERS="${MEMBERS}\"name\":\"${MEMBER_TAG}\","
86	  MEMBERS="${MEMBERS}\"origin\":\"${UPSTREAM}\","
87	  MEMBERS="${MEMBERS}\"digest\":\"${DIGEST}\","
88	  MEMBERS="${MEMBERS}\"verification\":\"oci-digest\","
89	  MEMBERS="${MEMBERS}\"tags\":[\"${MEMBER_TAG}\"]"
90	  MEMBERS="${MEMBERS}}"
91	done <<'MANIFEST'
92	gcloud|gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud:latest
93	docker|gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker:latest
94	alpine|docker.io/library/alpine:latest
95	syft|docker.io/anchore/syft:latest
96	binfmt|docker.io/tonistiigi/binfmt:latest
97	skopeo|quay.io/skopeo/stable:latest
98	gcrane|gcr.io/go-containerregistry/gcrane:debug
99	MANIFEST
100

1	#!/bin/bash
2	# RBGJM Step 01: Mirror image from upstream to GAR via skopeo
3	# Builder: skopeo (from reliquary)
4	# Substitutions: _RBGA_GAR_HOST, _RBGA_GAR_PATH, _RBGA_HALLMARKS_ROOT,
5	#                _RBGA_HALLMARK, _RBGA_BIND_SOURCE
6	#
7	# Registry-to-registry copy preserving multi-platform manifest lists.
8	# Mason SA ambient auth via Cloud Build metadata server for GAR destination.
9	# Public upstream images need no auth.
10	#
11	# Destination uses canonical AAK shape:
12	#   ${gar_host}/${gar_path}/${HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${hallmark}/image:${hallmark}
13	# matching rbgja02 (syft), rbgja04 (about), rbgjv03 (vouch).
14	
15	set -euo pipefail
16	
17	test -n "${_RBGA_GAR_HOST}"        || { echo "_RBGA_GAR_HOST missing"        >&2; exit 1; }
18	test -n "${_RBGA_GAR_PATH}"        || { echo "_RBGA_GAR_PATH missing"        >&2; exit 1; }
19	test -n "${_RBGA_HALLMARKS_ROOT}"  || { echo "_RBGA_HALLMARKS_ROOT missing"  >&2; exit 1; }
20	test -n "${_RBGA_HALLMARK}"        || { echo "_RBGA_HALLMARK missing"        >&2; exit 1; }
21	test -n "${_RBGA_BIND_SOURCE}"     || { echo "_RBGA_BIND_SOURCE missing"     >&2; exit 1; }
22	
23	DEST_REF="${_RBGA_GAR_HOST}/${_RBGA_GAR_PATH}/${_RBGA_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${_RBGA_HALLMARK}/image:${_RBGA_HALLMARK}"
24	
25	echo "=== Mirroring bind image via skopeo ==="
26	echo "Source: ${_RBGA_BIND_SOURCE}"
27	echo "Dest:   ${DEST_REF}"
28	
29	# Obtain OAuth2 token from Cloud Build metadata server (Mason SA)
30	echo "Fetching OAuth2 token from metadata server"
31	TOKEN_JSON=$(curl -sf -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" \
32	  "http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/service-accounts/default/token") \
33	  || { echo "Failed to fetch OAuth2 token from metadata server" >&2; exit 1; }
34	
35	# Extract access_token (no jq dependency — use grep+cut)
36	TOKEN=$(printf '%s' "${TOKEN_JSON}" | grep -o '"access_token":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4)
37	test -n "${TOKEN}" || { echo "Failed to extract access_token from metadata response" >&2; exit 1; }
38	
39	# Registry-to-registry copy preserving multi-platform manifest
40	skopeo copy --all \
41	  "docker://${_RBGA_BIND_SOURCE}" \
42	  "docker://${DEST_REF}" \
43	  --dest-creds "oauth2accesstoken:${TOKEN}" \
44	  || { echo "skopeo copy failed" >&2; exit 1; }
45	
46	echo "Image mirrored: ${DEST_REF}"
47	echo "=== Mirror step complete ==="
48

3	# (Mason SA). The canonical skopeo-to-GAR authentication (RBSCB): skopeo cannot
4	# use the gcloud credential helper, so the token is fetched in-memory and never
5	# written to /workspace, which carries non-secret data only.
6	#   requires: (none — ambient metadata server)

11	  || { echo "Failed to fetch OAuth2 token from metadata server" >&2; exit 1; }
12	
13	TOKEN=$(printf '%s' "${TOKEN_JSON}" | grep -o '"access_token":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4)
